note: GeneralAdapter1 morphoFlashLoan leg (reached via Bundler3 multicall(Call[])). Borrows `assets` of `token` via a Morpho Blue flash loan; the borrowed funds are used AND repaid INSIDE the reenter(Call[]) callback carried in `data` — that callback IS the leverage intent (swap, re-supply, borrow). The flash loan itself is net-neutral, so the leg emits NO own body (strategy=reenter_only); only the callback legs recurse, via emit.reenter_callback_arg. Per-leg-to multicall child.
